Variant Info - hg19

Frameshift: 17-41276045-ACT-A

Gene: BRCA1

pLI: 3.29e-20

Haploinsufficiency: 3

Exon: 2/23

Intron: -/22

Disease Mechanism

Gene Disease Inheritance Clinical Validity Disease Mechanism Consideration Adjusted Strength
